name: Smart Contracts
description: On-chain health record registry, consent, provider registry, KUSD, data marketplace, ACE policies

dbTables.name: HealthRecordRegistry
dbTables.description: Central on-chain registry. Receives CRE reports via ReceiverTemplate (forwarder-only). Uses ACE PolicyEngine to gate access grants. Stores IPFS CIDs and metadata only — never PHI.

columns.name: records
columns.description: recordId → { ipfsCid, recordType, uploadTimestamp, lastAccessedAt, isActive, patient }

columns.name: patientRecords
columns.description: patient address → array of their record IDs

columns.name: recordAccessLogs
columns.description: recordId → array of { provider, timestamp, aiReportHash, granted }

columns.name: policyEngine
columns.description: Reference to ACE PolicyEngine for access gate

events: RecordUploaded(uint256 indexed recordId, address indexed patient, uint8 recordType, string ipfsCid)
AccessGranted(uint256 indexed recordId, address indexed provider, address indexed patient, bytes32 aiReportHash)
AccessDenied(address indexed provider, address indexed patient, string reason)

dbTables.name: PatientConsent
dbTables.description: Standalone consent registry. Patients grant/revoke provider access with expiry. Providers emit AccessRequested for CRE Log Trigger. No ReceiverTemplate inheritance.

columns.name: consents
columns.description: patient → provider → { recordType, grantedAt, expiresAt, isActive }

columns.name: patientProviders
columns.description: patient → list of providers with consent

events: AccessRequested(address indexed provider, address indexed patient, uint8 recordType)
ConsentUpdated(address indexed patient, address indexed provider, bool granted)
AccessGranted(address indexed patient, address indexed provider, uint8 recordType, uint256 duration)
AccessDenied(address indexed patient, address indexed provider)
functions: grantAccess(address provider, uint8 recordType, uint256 duration)

dbTables.name: ProviderRegistry
dbTables.description: Registry of verified healthcare providers. Registration via CRE workflow (opcode 0x03) after off-chain license verification.

columns.name: providers
columns.description: address → { name, licenseHash, specialty, jurisdiction, isActive, registeredAt }

columns.name: providerList
columns.description: Ordered list of all registered provider addresses

events: ProviderRegistered(address indexed provider, string name, string specialty)

dbTables.name: KosynUSD
dbTables.description: ERC-20 stablecoin (6 decimals, symbol KUSD). Minting exclusively via CRE workflow after Stripe payment verification (opcode 0x04). No public mint function.
events: KUSDMinted(address indexed recipient, uint256 amount, bytes32 stripePaymentId)
Transfer(address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 value)

dbTables.name: DataMarketplace
dbTables.description: Marketplace for anonymized patient data. Patients list data, requesters pay KUSD for queries. CRE TEE processes queries (opcode 0x05) and distributes payment shares to contributors.

columns.name: queries
columns.description: queryId → { requester, queryParams, payment, fulfilled, resultHash }

columns.name: kusd
columns.description: Reference to KUSD token for payments

events: QuerySubmitted(uint256 indexed queryId, address indexed requester, uint256 payment)

dbTables.name: PolicyEngine (ACE)
dbTables.description: Orchestrates multiple IPolicy contracts. Calls IExtractor.extract first, then iterates all policies. Returns false on first failure.

dbTables.name: ProviderAllowlistPolicy (ACE)
dbTables.description: Enforces provider registration + patient consent for access-grant operations (opcode 0x01). All other opcodes pass through.

dbTables.name: AuditPolicy (ACE)
dbTables.description: Always returns true but emits AccessAudited event for every access check. Provides compliance audit trail.
events: AccessAudited(address indexed caller, uint8 operation, uint256 timestamp)
functions: check(address caller, bytes data) → bool (always true)

dbTables.name: KosynExtractor (ACE)
dbTables.description: Parses raw CRE report bytes into typed opcode + params. report[0] = opcode, report[1:] = params.
